gaps: AC-1: Journal page lacked page root data-bubble-id bTHDa on shell wrapper

evidence: frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx — passes pageBubbleId bTHDa to DashboardLayout via journalShellProps

frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — accepts bubbleId override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUe for other pages)

frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx — prototype journal UI wrapped in data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXid with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL; editor/delete dialogs remain outside journal-main boundary (page-level popups deferred to MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL)
